embedding.readyTitle: Semantic search is ready! Use natural language in the AI chat.

fallback.title: WebGPU said "nope"
fallback.subtitle: Your browser doesn't support GPU acceleration
fallback.description: Couldn't create embeddings with WebGPU, so semantic search (Graph RAG) won't be as smart. The graph still works fine though!
fallback.skipDescription: Graph works, just no AI semantic search
fallback.smallCodebase: Small codebase detected! CPU should be fine.
fallback.tip: 💡 Tip: Try Chrome or Edge for WebGPU support

queryFab.noProject: No project loaded. Load a project first.
queryFab.dbNotReady: Database not ready. Please wait for loading to complete.

fileTree.selectNodeDepth: Select a node to apply depth filter
fileTree.nodeTypesDesc: Toggle visibility of node types in the graph
fileTree.focusDepthDesc: Show nodes within N hops of selection

codePanel.title: Code Inspector
codePanel.selectFile: Select a file node to preview its contents.
codePanel.codeNotAvailable: Code not available in memory for {{path}}

chatOnly.title: Graph not loaded
chatOnly.description: This is a large project, so the graph was skipped to keep the browser responsive. AI chat works normally.
chatOnly.descriptionWithCount: This project has {{count}} nodes, so the graph was skipped to keep the browser responsive. AI chat works normally.
chatOnly.citationNote: While the graph is unloaded, inline file citations from chat won't auto-open in the Code panel.
chatOnly.loadAnywayWarning: This project has {{count}} nodes. Loading the full graph may make the browser slow or unresponsive. Continue?
chatOnly.loadAnywayWarningUnknown: This may be a large project. Loading the full graph may make the browser slow or unresponsive. Continue?

processes.emptyDescription: Processes are execution flows traced from entry points. Load a codebase to see detected processes.
processes.removeHighlightTitle: Click to remove highlight from graph

processFlow.title: Process: {{label}}
processFlow.tooComplex_one: This diagram has {{count}} step and is too complex to render. Try viewing individual processes instead of "All Processes".
processFlow.tooComplex_other: This diagram has {{count}} steps and is too complex to render. Try viewing individual processes instead of "All Processes".
